title: clerodendrum calamitosum
intro: Clerodendrum calamitosum, also known as the Lizard Plant or Glory Bower, is a tropical plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds and skin infections, and relieving digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Clerodendrum calamitosum typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and roots of the plant, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
